description_long: This object depicts an adult male figure with exaggerated, elongated limbs and a stylized, angular body. The arms are extended outward in a dramatic V-shape, resembling wings, and the legs are bent at sharp angles, giving the figure a geometric, almost mechanical appearance. The head is proportionally small and features realistic facial details, while the rest of the body is rendered in a simplified, abstract style. The figure appears to be wearing a fitted suit with a collared shirt, and the shoes are pointed and formal. There is a thin rod or stick extending diagonally behind the figure, possibly as part of the stylized design. The overall impression is of a surreal, artistic representation of a pedestrian adult, blending human and abstract elements.
description: A stylized adult male figure with elongated, angular limbs and a fitted suit, arms outstretched in a dramatic V-shape. The design is abstract and geometric, with realistic facial features and formal attire.
description_view_0: Front view shows the figure's face, outstretched arms forming a wide V, and sharply bent legs in a geometric pose.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the extreme length of the arms, the angular bend of the legs, and the thin rod extending behind the figure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the V-shaped arms, and the abstract, angular form of the body and legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other profile, emphasizing the elongated limbs and the stylized, mechanical posture.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and formal trousers
attribute_posture: standing with arms outstretched and legs bent in a stylized pose
